== Notes for [[Item:Q106819|Q106819]] ==

* '''Progenitor of Abbasid Caliphate (Dynasty)'''

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abbasid
--------------------
Ali ibn Abdullah (died 736), who was the grandfather of the first two Abbasid caliphs, who replaced the Umayyads in 750.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000008649056419

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
